info.title: Wasabi Card API
info.description:
Backend integration layer for the Wasabi Card Open API platform.

## Authentication
All endpoints require an **X-API-KEY** header.

## Response Envelope
Every response uses: `{ success, code, msg, data }`

## Rate Limiting
60 requests per minute per API key.

get.description: Returns all accounts with live balances for the merchant. Data is real-time and never cached. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/account/info
Returns a paginated list of accounts with optional filters. Data is real-time and never cached. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/account/list

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Filter by account ID

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by account type: WALLET (Wallet Account) or MARGIN (Margin Account)

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Current page number. Default is 1

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 10

get.description: Returns the details of a single account by accountId. Data is real-time and never cached. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/account/single/query

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The account ID to query

get.description:
Returns a paginated ledger transaction history for a specific account.

`direction`: IN = credit, OUT = debit.

`startTime` / `endTime`: Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/account/transaction

parameters.name: pageNum
parameters.description: Current page number. Default is 1

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 100

parameters.name: orderNo
parameters.description: Filter by transaction id

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Filter by account ID

parameters.name: bizType
parameters.description: Filter by transaction type. Values: chain_deposit, chain_withdraw, card_purchase, card_deposit, card_withdraw, card_cancel, card_auth_fee_patch, card_cross_board_patch, gt_transfer, fixed, card_overdraft_statement, gt_transfer_refund, card_settlement, card_refund, fund_transfer, fund_collection, card_decline_fee

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start transaction time. Unix timestamp (milliseconds). Time range cannot exceed 30 days. Default queries the most recent 30 days.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End transaction time. Unix timestamp (milliseconds). Time range cannot exceed 30 days. Default queries the most recent 30 days.

post.description: Creates a new shared MARGIN account for the merchant. Returns the newly created account details. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/account/create

Transfer funds between accounts.

`type`: TRANSFER = transfer between accounts; COLLECTION = fund collection.

`merchantOrderNo`: Client-side unique transaction ID, length must be between 20 and 40 characters.

`payerAccountId`: Payer account (typically WALLET type).

`payeeAccountId`: Payee account (typically MARGIN type).

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/account/transfer

type.description: Operation type: TRANSFER = represents transfer; COLLECTION = represents collection

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 20 and 40 characters

amount.description: Amount of operation (BigDecimal as string to preserve precision)

payerAccountId.description: Payer ID, typically an account ID of type WALLET

payeeAccountId.description: Payee ID, usually an account ID of type MARGIN

post.description: Returns all supported card types (bins) available to the merchant. Use `cardTypeId` from this response when creating a card. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/v2/cardTypes

category.description: Card category: GIFT, PURCHASE, SUBSCRIPTION, PHYSICAL

support.description: Supporting merchant list. For reference only

risk.description: High risk merchant list. Consumption in this scenario will trigger card cancellation risk

needCardHolder.description: Whether a cardholder is required to create this card

needDepositForActiveCard.description: Whether an initial deposit is required to activate the card

depositAmountMinQuotaForActiveCard.description: Minimum deposit amount required for card activation (BigDecimal)

depositAmountMaxQuotaForActiveCard.description: Maximum deposit amount allowed for card activation (BigDecimal)

balanceRetentionQuota.description: Minimum balance to retain on the card

cardHolderMaxCardLimit.description: Maximum number of cards per cardholder

supportSettingNoPinPaymentAmount.description: Whether setting a no-PIN payment amount is supported

supportSetting.description: Whether this control can be customised

supportSettingMcc.description: Whether MCC (merchant category code) filtering is supported

supportUpdateCardHolerEmail.description: Whether updating the cardholder email is supported

post.description:
**Deprecated** — Create (open) a new card.

`cardNo` is only returned in the response when `status=success`.

`amount`: The deposit amount when creating the card. If not passed, defaults to `depositAmountMinQuotaForActiveCard`. Valid range from the Support Bins response: `needDepositForActiveCard=true` AND `depositAmountMinQuotaForActiveCard <= amount <= depositAmountMaxQuotaForActiveCard`.

`cardNumber`: Required when creating a physical card.

`accountId`: All payments are deducted from this account. Obtain from the Account List API.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/openCard

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

cardTypeId.description: Card type id (from Support Bins API)

amount.description: Deposit amount when creating the card (BigDecimal as string). Optional — defaults to depositAmountMinQuotaForActiveCard if not passed

cardNumber.description: Card number. Required when creating a physical card

accountId.description: Account ID. All payments will be deducted from this account. Obtain from the Account List API

cardNo.description: Card id — only returned when status=success

post.description:
Create (open) a new card using the V2 endpoint.

`amount` is **required** in V2 (unlike the deprecated endpoint where it was optional).

`designId`: Optional brand design ID for white-label and gift card customisation — obtain available IDs from your Wasabi account manager.

`cardNumber`: Required when creating a physical card.

`accountId`: All payments are deducted from this account. Obtain from the Account List API.

Returns a single order object. `cardNo` is only populated once `status=success`.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/v2/createCard

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

cardTypeId.description: Card type id (from Support Bins API)

amount.description: Deposit amount when creating the card (BigDecimal as string). Required in V2

cardNumber.description: Card number. Required when creating a physical card

accountId.description: Account ID. All payments will be deducted from this account. Obtain from the Account List API

designId.description: Brand design ID for white-label and gift card customisation (optional)

cardNo.description: Card id — only returned when status=success

post.description:
Retrieve detailed information for a specific card.

When `onlySimpleInfo=true` (default), the `balanceInfo` field is excluded — use this for faster responses when balance data is not needed.

Set `onlySimpleInfo=false` to include the card's current balance in the response.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/info

onlySimpleInfo.description: When true (default), excludes balance info from the response

status.description: Card status: pending, un_activated, normal, cancel, freeze, blocked

balanceInfo.description: Balance info — only populated when onlySimpleInfo=false

supportSetting.description: Whether this control can be customised

post.description:
Retrieve sensitive card data: card number, CVV, expiry date, and activate URL.

All response values are **RSA-encrypted** with the user's public key and must be decrypted using the merchant's private key.

**Gift cards**: `cardNumber`, `cvv`, and `expireDate` are NOT returned. `activateUrl` IS returned.

**Non-gift cards**: `cardNumber`, `cvv`, and `expireDate` are returned. `activateUrl` is NOT returned.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/sensitive

cardNumber.description: RSA-encrypted card number. Gift card not returned

cvv.description: RSA-encrypted CVV. Gift card not returned

expireDate.description: RSA-encrypted expiry date (MM/YYYY). Gift card not returned

activateUrl.description: RSA-encrypted activation URL. Gift card only

post.description:
Retrieve the available balance for a specific card.

Note: some card bins do not support `usedAmount` — it may be returned as 0 or null for those cards.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/balanceInfo

usedAmount.description: Amount used. Some card bins do not support this field (BigDecimal)

post.description:
Return a paginated list of cards for the merchant.

`pageNum` defaults to 1. `pageSize` defaults to 10, maximum 100.

All filter params are optional: filter by `cardNo`, `status`, `cardTypeId`, `holderId`, or creation time range (`startTime`/`endTime` as millisecond Unix timestamps).

**Status values**: `pending`, `un_activated`, `Normal`, `Freeze`, `Freezing`, `UnFreezing`, `canceling`, `cancel`, `fail`

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/list

status.description: Filter by card status (optional). Values: pending, un_activated, Normal, Freeze, Freezing, UnFreezing, canceling, cancel, fail

startTime.description: Filter by card creation time — range start (Unix ms, optional)

endTime.description: Filter by card creation time — range end (Unix ms, optional)

status.description: Card status: pending, un_activated, Normal, Freeze, Freezing, UnFreezing, canceling, cancel, fail

noPinPaymentAmount.description: Physical card password-free payment amount limit (BigDecimal)

usedAmount.description: Amount used. Some card bins do not support this field (BigDecimal)

post.description:
Update card attributes.

Updatable fields:
- `noPinPaymentAmount`: updatable only when `metadata.supportSettingNoPinPaymentAmount = true` in Support Bins. Valid range: `metadata.noPinPaymentAmountMinQuota <= value <= metadata.noPinPaymentAmountMaxQuota`.
- `spendingControls`: updatable only when `metadata.spendingControls = true` and `supportSetting = true` for that interval.
- `riskControls`: updatable only when `metadata.supportSettingMcc = true`. Only one of `allowedMcc` or `blockedMcc` can be set per card. Pass an empty array to remove MCC rules.
- `clientRemark`: free-text note, max 50 chars.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/updateAttribute

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

noPinPaymentAmount.description: Physical card password-free payment amount limit (BigDecimal). Updatable only when metadata.supportSettingNoPinPaymentAmount=true

spendingControls.description: Spending control rules. Updatable only when metadata.spendingControls=true and supportSetting=true for the interval

riskControls.description: Risk control rules. Updatable only when metadata.supportSettingMcc=true. Only one of allowedMcc or blockedMcc may be set. Pass empty array to remove.

receivedAmount.description: Amount received — only populated when status=success (BigDecimal)

receivedCurrency.description: Account currency — only populated when status=success

description.example: update pin free amount from [200] to [2000];

remark.description: Transaction notes — equal to description, will be removed
remark.example: update pin free amount from [200] to [2000];

post.description:
Update the client remark (note) on a card.

`clientRemark`: optional free-text note of 0–50 characters. Omit or pass null to clear the remark.

Returns the full updated card info object.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/note

clientRemark.description: Client remark. Length 0–50 characters (optional — omit or pass null to clear)

200.description: Successful response — returns the full updated card info object

status.description: Card status: pending, un_activated, Normal, Freeze, Freezing, UnFreezing, canceling, cancel, fail

noPinPaymentAmount.description: Physical card password-free payment amount limit (BigDecimal)

usedAmount.description: Amount used. Some card bins do not support this field (BigDecimal)

supportSetting.description: Whether this control can be customised

post.description:
Freeze a card using the V2 endpoint.

Once frozen, the card cannot be used for transactions until unfrozen.

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

**Status values**: `wait_process` (pending), `processing`, `success`, `fail`

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/v2/freeze

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

receivedAmount.description: Amount received — only populated when status=success (BigDecimal)

receivedCurrency.description: Account currency — only populated when status=success

post.description:
Unfreeze a previously frozen card using the V2 endpoint.

Once unfrozen, the card can resume normal transactions.

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

**Status values**: `wait_process` (pending), `processing`, `success`, `fail`

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/v2/unfreeze

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

receivedAmount.description: Amount received — only populated when status=success (BigDecimal)

receivedCurrency.description: Account currency — only populated when status=success

post.description:
Deposit funds into a card.

The deposit amount must be ≥ the minimum allowed by the card type's `rechargeMinQuota` and ≤ `rechargeMaxQuota`.

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

**Status values**: `wait_process` (pending), `processing`, `success`, `fail`

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/deposit

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

receivedAmount.description: Amount received — only populated when status=success (BigDecimal)

receivedCurrency.description: Account currency — only populated when status=success

post.description:
Withdraw funds from a card back to the merchant account.

The withdrawal amount must be ≥ 0.01.

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

**Status values**: `wait_process` (pending), `processing`, `success`, `fail`

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/withdraw

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

receivedAmount.description: Amount received — only populated when status=success (BigDecimal)

receivedCurrency.description: Account currency — only populated when status=success

post.description:
Cancel a card permanently. After cancellation the card cannot be used.

Any remaining balance on the card will be returned to the merchant account (reflected as `receivedAmount` when `status=success`).

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

**Status values**: `wait_process` (pending), `processing`, `success`, `fail`

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/cancel

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

receivedAmount.description: Amount received (remaining card balance returned to merchant) — only populated when status=success (BigDecimal)

receivedCurrency.description: Account currency — only populated when status=success

post.description:
Activate a physical card by providing the card PIN and activation code.

`pin`: 6-digit card password set by the user.

`activeCode`: Activation code printed on or provided with the physical card.

`noPinPaymentAmount`: The contactless/no-PIN payment limit (0–2000 USD). Defaults to 500 USD if not provided.

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

**Status values**: `wait_process` (pending), `processing`, `success`, `fail`

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/physicalCard/activeCard

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

pin.description: Card password. 6 digits. Rules: no 3+ consecutive repeated digits; not a fully ascending or descending sequence; no repeated two- or three-digit segments (e.g., 123123, 909090, 121212)

activeCode.description: Activation code provided with the physical card

noPinPaymentAmount.description: Contactless / no-PIN payment limit (BigDecimal). Range: 0–2000 USD. Defaults to 500 USD (optional)

post.description:
Update the PIN for a physical card.

**PIN rules**:
1. Must be a 6-digit number.
2. Cannot have 3 or more consecutive repeated digits.
3. Cannot be an entirely ascending or descending sequence.
4. Cannot contain repeated two- or three-digit segments (e.g., 123123, 909090, 121212).

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

**Status values**: `wait_process` (pending), `processing`, `success`, `fail`

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/physicalCard/updatePin

merchantOrderNo.description: Client transaction id. Length must be between 15 and 65 characters

pin.description: New PIN. 6 digits. Rules: no 3+ consecutive repeated digits; not fully ascending/descending; no repeated two- or three-digit segments (e.g., 123123, 909090, 121212)

post.description:
Returns a paginated list of card purchase transactions, covering card fees and initial deposit amounts.

**Note**: This endpoint does NOT support webhooks.

Use `startTime` / `endTime` (Unix milliseconds) to filter by trading time.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/purchaseTransaction

pageSize.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 100

startTime.description: Start trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

endTime.description: End trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

status.description: Transaction status: wait_process (pending), processing, success, fail

post.description:
Returns a paginated list of card operation transactions.

Covers card lifecycle events: deposit, cancel, freeze (Freeze), unfreeze (UnFreeze), withdraw, update_pin (Update PIN), blocked (Block Card), card_update (Update Card), and overdraft_statement (Card overdraft statement).

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/transaction

pageSize.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 100

type.description: Transaction type filter (optional). Values: create (Create Card), deposit (Deposit Card), cancel (Cancel Card), Freeze (Freeze Card), UnFreeze (UnFreeze Card), withdraw (Withdraw Card), update_pin (Update PIN), blocked (Block Card), card_update (Update Card), overdraft_statement (Card overdraft statement)

startTime.description: Start trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

endTime.description: End trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

post.description:
Returns a paginated list of card operation transactions — V2 endpoint.

**Note**: Cards created via the deprecated `/merchant/core/mcb/card/openCard` endpoint will NOT appear here — those records live on the Card Purchase Transaction interface.

Covers all V2 card lifecycle events: create (Create Card), deposit (Deposit Card), cancel (Cancel Card), Freeze (Freeze Card), UnFreeze (UnFreeze Card), withdraw (Withdraw Card), update_pin (Update PIN), blocked (Block Card), card_update (Update Card), overdraft_statement (Card overdraft statement).

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/v2/transaction

pageSize.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 100

type.description: Transaction type filter (optional). Values: create (Create Card), deposit (Deposit Card), cancel (Cancel Card), Freeze (Freeze Card), UnFreeze (UnFreeze Card), withdraw (Withdraw Card), update_pin (Update PIN), blocked (Block Card), card_update (Update Card), overdraft_statement (Card overdraft statement)

startTime.description: Start trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

endTime.description: End trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

post.description:
Returns a paginated list of card authorization transactions (consumption bill).

**Type values**:
- `auth`: Authorization (also known as consumption) — e.g., subscribing to a GPT monthly membership generates a consumption record.
- `Void`: Reversal. When a user initiates an `auth` transaction but a refund is issued before the acquiring bank and issuing bank settle, this is classed as a reversal.
- `refund`: When a user initiates an `auth` transaction and both banks have already settled, the user then initiates a refund.
- `verification`: Card binding verification — e.g., binding a card to Alipay for consume generates a card binding transaction record.
- `maintain_fee`: Card fee (monthly fee, annual fee, ATM withdraw fee...).

**Status values**:
- `authorized`: The transaction is still being processed and has not yet been settled.
- `failed`: The transaction failed.
- `succeed`: The transaction has been completed.

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/authTransaction

pageSize.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 100

type.description: Transaction type filter (optional). Values: auth (Authorization), Void (Reversal), refund, verification, maintain_fee (Card fee)

startTime.description: Start trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

endTime.description: End trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

originTradeNo.description: Original transaction serial number (for Void/refund types)

walletType.description: Wallet type used for the transaction (e.g., ApplePay, GooglePay)

type.description: Transaction type: auth (Authorization), Void (Reversal), refund, verification, maintain_fee

status.description: Status: authorized (processing/not yet settled), failed, succeed (completed)

post.description:
Returns a paginated list of card authorization fee transactions.

If the user's bank card balance is insufficient to cover the authorization fee, the bank will deduct Wasabi's funds to offset the fee. Wasabi will then debit the merchant's reserve account on the platform to offset the fee.

**Fee Collection Process**:
1. Bank debits the card balance (deduction fails due to insufficient card balance).
2. Bank debits Wasabi's reserve funds to offset the fee. The bill is sent to Wasabi.
3. Wasabi verifies the card balance and debits the card balance to offset the fee (deduction fails due to insufficient card balance).
4. Wasabi debits the merchant's reserve account on the platform to offset the fee (a fee record will be generated after this link is executed).

**Trade type values**:
- `card_patch_fee`: Authorization fee
- `card_patch_cross_border`: Cross border fee

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/authFeeTransaction

pageSize.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 100

tradeType.description: Transaction type of card (optional filter). Values: card_patch_fee (Authorization fee), card_patch_cross_border (Cross border fee)

originTradeNo.description: Origin authorization transaction serial number (optional filter)

startTime.description: Start trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

endTime.description: End trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

type.description: Transaction type: card_patch_fee (Authorization fee), card_patch_cross_border (Cross border fee)

deductionSourceFunds.description: Source of funds used for deduction

post.description:
Returns a paginated list of card 3DS transactions.

**Type values** (determines the shape of `values` field):
- `third_3ds_otp`: OTP — `values` contains an encrypted OTP code (plain text example: 204566). No `expirationTime` field.
- `auth_url`: Transaction authorization response URL — `values` contains an encrypted URL (plain text example: https://www.google.com). `expirationTime` is populated.
- `activation_code`: Physical card activation code — `values` contains an encrypted activation code (plain text example: 20834698). `currency`, `amount`, and `merchantName` may be null.

All `values` are encrypted and must be decrypted using the merchant's private key.

This endpoint supports a webhook notification on status change.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/third3dsTransaction

pageSize.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 100

type.description: Type filter (optional). Values: third_3ds_otp (OTP), auth_url (Transaction authorization response URL), activation_code (physical card activation code)

startTime.description: Start trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

endTime.description: End trading time filter (Unix milliseconds timestamp, optional)

amount.description: Transaction amount (BigDecimal as string; "0" for activation_code type)

merchantName.description: Merchant name (Transaction Scenario). Null for activation_code type

values.description: Encrypted payload. Decrypt with merchant private key. third_3ds_otp: OTP code; auth_url: Authorization URL; activation_code: Activation code

type.description: Transaction type: third_3ds_otp (OTP), auth_url (Authorization URL), activation_code (Physical card activation code)

expirationTime.description: Expiration time (Unix ms). Only populated for auth_url type

post.description:
Simulate an authorized transaction against a card. Intended for **sandbox / testing environments only**.

**Type values**:
- `auth`: Transaction authorization
- `refund`: Transaction refund
- `Void`: Transaction cancellation
- `maintain_fee`: Card fee

`originSerialNumber` is required when `type` is `Void` or `refund` — it specifies the original transaction ID to cancel or refund.

Returns an empty data object `{}` on success.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/card/simulateAuthTransaction

type.description: Transaction type. Values: auth (Transaction authorization), refund (Transaction refund), Void (Transaction cancellation), maintain_fee (Card fee)

originSerialNumber.description: Cancel or refund the specified original transaction ID. Required when type is Void or refund (optional)

200.description: Successful response — returns empty data object

get.description: Returns all supported countries and regions (ISO 3166-1). Response is cached for 24 hours. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/common/region
Returns a flat list of cities. Optionally filter by country/region code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Response is cached for 24 hours. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/common/city

parameters.name: regionCode
parameters.description: Filter by country/region code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2), e.g. AU

get.description: Returns cities grouped in a two-level hierarchy: province/state/region → city. Optionally filter by country/region code. Response is cached for 24 hours. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/common/v2/city

parameters.name: regionCode
parameters.description: Filter by country/region code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2), e.g. AU

get.description: Returns all supported international mobile dialling codes. Response is cached for 24 hours. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/common/mobileAreaCode

enableGlobalTransfer.description: Whether global transfer is enabled for this country

post.description: Upload a file and receive a fileId for use in subsequent API calls (e.g. KYC document submission). Supported formats: jpg, jpeg, png, pdf. Maximum size: 2 MB. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/common/file/upload

file.description: File to upload. Supported formats: jpg, jpeg, png, pdf. Maximum size: 2 MB.

fileId.description: Uploaded file identifier for use in subsequent API calls

422.description: Validation error (invalid file type or size exceeded)

post.description:
**Deprecated** — Place an order for wallet recharge. Returns the order number, deposit address, and the actual amount to send.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/account/walletDeposit

actualDepositAmount.description: Actual on-chain amount to send (includes network fees)

toAddress.description: Destination wallet address to send funds to

expireSecond.description: Seconds until the deposit order expires (e.g. 10800 = 3 hours)

post.description:
**Deprecated** — Query wallet deposit transaction history (paginated).

Note: `status=fail` is not a final state — it may be manually updated to `status=success`.

`startTime` / `endTime`: Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/account/walletDepositTransaction

pageSize.description: Number of records per page. Default 10, maximum 100

status.description: Filter by status. wait_process: Wait process; processing: Processing; success: Success; fail: Failed (fail is not a final state)

needDepositTxAmount.description: On-chain amount required to complete the deposit

receivedAmount.description: Net amount credited to the account after fees

status.description: Transaction status: wait_process, processing, success, fail (fail is not final)

post.description: Returns the list of all supported coins and chains available for wallet operations. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/wallet/v2/coins

Create a wallet deposit address for a given coin and chain.

Only supported when the coin's `enabled=true`. You can also automatically generate a wallet address by selecting the coin and chain in the dashboard.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/wallet/v2/create

coinKey.description: Coin key (from Coin List-v2, e.g. USDT_BEP20, USDT_TRC20)

post.description: Returns all wallet deposit addresses created for the merchant. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/wallet/v2/addressList

Returns paginated wallet transaction history (deposits and withdrawals).

`type`: DEPOSIT or WITHDRAW.

`status`: wait_process = Pending; processing = Processing; success = Success; fail = Failed.

`startTime` / `endTime`: Unix timestamp (milliseconds). Time range cannot exceed 90 days. Default queries the most recent 90 days.

Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/wallet/v2/transaction

pageSize.description: Number of pages per page. Default: 10; Maximum: 100

status.description: Status: wait_process = Pending; processing = Processing; success = Success; fail = Failed

startTime.description: Order start time. Millisecond timestamp. Range cannot exceed 90 days

endTime.description: Order end time. Millisecond timestamp. Range cannot exceed 90 days

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of work orders with optional filters. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/work/list

parameters.name: merchantOrderNo
parameters.description: Filter by merchant order reference number

parameters.name: orderNo
parameters.description: Filter by Wasabi platform work order number

parameters.name: tradeType
parameters.description: Filter by work order type (e.g. CARD_ACTIVE)

parameters.name: tradeStatus
parameters.description: Filter by status: processing, success, failed

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: Page number (1-based)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Records per page (default 10)

post.description: Submit a new work order to the Wasabi Card platform (e.g. card activation, dispute). Returns the created work order details. Source: Wasabi Card /merchant/core/mcb/work/submit

title.description: Short descriptive title for the work order
